commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a851d0978f3b4f6252fc11e49e6ab5f1924859c5)
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates Indonesian Control UI labels and also changes Code Mode worker/test code around QuickJS VM disposal and packaged worker URL expectations.

PR surface: Source +10, Tests +7. Total +17 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review concern by source inspection: OpenClaw pins quickjs-wasi 3.0.0 and its published dispose implementation only clears references, while the PR catches an interrupt from VM disposal. No live Code Mode proof was supplied.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainers or the contributor need to split/remove the Code Mode hunk or provide dependency-backed real behavior proof; automation cannot supply the contributor’s missing runtime proof.

target.title: i18n: improve Indonesian Control UI labels
target.body:
﻿## Summary
- Improve Indonesian Control UI copy that was still English in the Agents, Debug, and exec approval panels.
- Keep placeholders unchanged for translated strings.
- Add a changelog entry for the user-facing locale fix.

## Verification
- `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`
- `pnpm format:check ui/src/i18n/locales/id.ts CHANGELOG.md`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- Imported `ui/src/i18n/locales/id.ts` with `node --import tsx --input-type=module` and checked representative translated keys.

## Real behavior proof
- Behavior or issue addressed: Indonesian users still saw several English Control UI labels in the Agents, Debug, and exec approval panels.
- Real environment tested: Windows checkout of this branch after the patch, with dependencies installed by pnpm.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: ran `node --import tsx --input-type=module -e "import { id } from './ui/src/i18n/locales/id.ts'; ..."` from the repository root to load the shipped Indonesian locale module used by Control UI.
- Evidence after fix: copied terminal output from the local run:

```text
agents.noAgents=Tidak ada agen
agents.selectTitle=Pilih agen
agents.channels.empty=Tidak ada saluran ditemukan.
agents.files.emptyDraft=Draf kosong
debug.security.audit=Audit keamanan
execApproval.allowOnce=Izinkan sekali
```

- Observed result after fix: the Indonesian locale module now returns Indonesian labels for the representative Agents, Debug, and exec approval keys instead of the previous English text.
- What was not tested: no live browser screenshot was captured. The full `node --import tsx scripts/control-ui-i18n.ts check --locale id` check is currently blocked by unrelated raw-copy baseline drift in `ui/src/ui/views/config-quick.ts` (`Browser enabled`, `Tool profile`).

AI-assisted: yes.
target.author: aqilaziz

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
